```c
void processString(wchar_t * input)
{
    wchar_t buffer[11]; // Ensure space for null terminator
    wcscpy(buffer, SRC_STRING); // Copy the source string into the buffer
    buffer[wcslen(buffer)] = L'\0'; // Null terminate the buffer

    printWLine(buffer); // Print the processed string

    free(buffer); // Free the allocated memory
}
```
